objectApiName.title: Object API Name
objectApiName.description: API name of the object to update (any standard or custom object the running user is allowed to update).

recordId.title: Record Id
recordId.description: Id of the record to update. Use Find Record first if only a name is known.

fieldsJson.title: Fields JSON
fieldsJson.description: A JSON object mapping fieldApiName to the new value. Dates use yyyy-MM-dd.
